trades.catalyst: March CPI monthly print was 0.3%, significantly below 0.8%
trades.risk_notes: Data already released, minimal timing risk

avoid.reason: Insufficient specific NOAA forecast data for April 10, 2026 weather conditions to make reliable temperature range predictions
No credible crypto technical analysis or institutional price targets available for such short-term price movements
BEA advance estimate not yet available, insufficient nowcasting data to assess above/below thresholds reliably

notes: Disinflationary regime evident from March CPI print of 2.8% YoY (0.3% monthly), below consensus expectations. Fed has shifted hawkish due to Iran war oil price concerns, with dot plot showing only one cut projected for 2026. Markets still pricing multiple scenarios creating arbitrage opportunities in Fed policy and inflation outcome markets.
